## DAY 2026-03-23 (TW=1237.86, -16)
RESULTS: 494140 IQAir country=Pakistan (0.18#3, +19.06 spread-held); 262505=UAE (0.12#3, +3.31); 698278 IPL=RCB(not listed -6.33); 757107 IQAir city=Loni(not listed -13.82); 912807 Lukashenko=North Korea(had Russia 0.35, -18.25 obvious-anchor). 16 active, wind-down.
EOF
python3 -c "
import csv
csv.field_size_limit(10**7)
ids={'200605','240291'}
with open('market.csv') as f:
    r=csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in r:
        if row['qid'] in ids:
            print('==',row['qid'],'|',row['title'])
            print('  BG:', row['background'][:240])
            print('  MY:', row['my_prediction'])
"
